title: IntroductoryPriceInfo
description: Contains the introductory price information for a subscription.

introductoryPriceCurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the introductory price.

introductoryPriceAmountMicros.description: Introductory price in micro-units of the currency.

introductoryPricePeriod.description: Introductory price period in ISO 8601 format (e.g., P1W for one week, P1M for one month).

introductoryPriceCycles.description: Number of billing periods the introductory price applies for.
